summary: Phase 3.7e Testing Complete - Notification System & Multilingual Email Templates. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. Fixed HTML nesting issue in NotificationBell component.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/notifications correctly returns notifications for logged-in user with recipient_id filter
GET /api/notifications supports unread_only and limit query parameters
GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns correct count for badge display
PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read marks single notification as read
PATCH /api/notifications/read-all marks all user notifications as read
NotificationBell component visible in StaffLayout (desktop + mobile header)
NotificationBell component visible in ApplicantLayout (desktop + mobile header)
Notification dropdown opens on click with list, unread badge, mark-all-read button
Click notification navigates to link and marks as read
All 7 email templates support DE/EN via lang parameter
All 8 notification types have DE/EN templates
Status change triggers email + notification to applicant (automation.py wiring verified)
Teacher assignment triggers email + notification to both applicant and teacher (teacher.py wiring verified)
Consent grant/revoke triggers notification to assigned teacher (consents.py wiring verified)
Document upload by applicant triggers notification to staff (documents.py wiring verified)
seed_data_creation: Test notifications exist in DB (applicant has 2, staff has 1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7e complete. Notification system fully functional. NotificationBell in StaffLayout and ApplicantLayout. 4 notification endpoints working. 7 DE/EN email templates. 8 notification types with DE/EN. Fixed button-inside-button HTML nesting issue in NotificationBell.js. All auth flows working for 4 roles.
passed_checks: Backend: Health endpoint returns OK
Backend: Admin login (superadmin role)
Backend: Staff login (staff role)
Backend: Teacher login (teacher role)
Backend: Applicant login (applicant role)
Backend: GET /api/notifications requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count requires auth (401)
Backend: Applicant can list notifications
Backend: Notifications limit param works
Backend: Notifications unread_only filter works
Backend: Applicant can get unread count
Backend: Staff can list notifications
Backend: Staff can get unread count
Backend: Teacher can list notifications
Backend: PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read requires auth (401)
Backend: PATCH /api/notifications/read-all requires auth (401)
Backend: Mark single notification read works
Backend: Mark all notifications read works
Backend: Non-existent notification returns not_found status
Backend: Consent types include teacher_data_access with DE/EN
Backend: Teacher list endpoint works
Backend: All 7 email templates support lang parameter
Backend: All 8 notification types have DE/EN templates
Frontend: Staff login redirects to /staff
Frontend: NotificationBell visible in Staff layout (2 bells: mobile + desktop)
Frontend: Notification dropdown opens in Staff layout
Frontend: Mark all read button visible
Frontend: Notification items displayed correctly
Frontend: Applicant login redirects to /portal
Frontend: NotificationBell visible in Applicant layout (2 bells: mobile + desktop)
Frontend: Notification dropdown opens in Applicant layout
Frontend: Applicant notifications show DE content (Dokument angefordert, Statusänderung)
Frontend: Mobile view notification bell works
Frontend: Teacher login redirects to /staff
Frontend: NotificationBell visible in Teacher layout
Frontend: Teacher sees 'No notifications' empty state
Frontend: Click notification navigates to link
Frontend: Click notification marks as read (badge updates)
Frontend: No HTML hydration errors after fix

fixes_applied.issue: Button inside button HTML nesting causing hydration errors
fixes_applied.fix: Changed outer button to div with role='button' and keyboard handlers
